templates: Dear Customer, Your BESCOM electricity bill of ₹{amount} is overdue. Pay immediately to avoid disconnection. Click: {url}
BESCOM Alert: Your connection will be disconnected today due to pending bill ₹{amount}. Pay now: {url}
Urgent: BESCOM bill payment of Rs.{amount} pending. Last date today. Avoid disconnection: {url}
Your BESCOM meter reading shows ₹{amount} due. Immediate payment required to continue service. {url}
BESCOM Notice: Consumer ID {consumer_id} - Bill overdue ₹{amount}. Service disconnection scheduled. Pay: {url}
BBMP Notice: Property tax penalty of ₹{amount} due. Clear within 24 hours or face legal action: {url}
Urgent: Your BBMP property tax is overdue. Pay ₹{amount} immediately to avoid seizure. {url}
BBMP Alert: PID {property_id} - Tax demand of Rs.{amount}. Pay before court notice issued. {url}
Final Notice from BBMP: Property tax dues ₹{amount}. Legal action will be initiated. Pay now: {url}
Your property khata has been flagged for unpaid BBMP tax ₹{amount}. Clear dues: {url}
BWSSB Alert: Update your KYC to continue water supply. Click here: {url}
Your BWSSB connection requires KYC verification. Complete within 24 hours to avoid disconnection: {url}
BWSSB Notice: Consumer ID {consumer_id} - KYC expired. Update immediately: {url}
Water supply will be stopped if KYC not updated. BWSSB portal: {url}
Mandatory BWSSB KYC update required for all consumers. Verify your details: {url}
Congratulations! You won ₹{amount} in Karnataka State Lottery. Claim now: {url}
Dear Winner! Your mobile number selected for ₹{amount} prize. Claim before {date}: {url}
LUCKY DRAW: You have won Rs.{amount} cash prize! Verify and claim: {url}
KBC Lottery: You won ₹{amount}. Call {phone} or visit {url} to claim your prize
Government of Karnataka Lottery: ₹{amount} credited to your account. Verify: {url}
Your {department} account will be suspended. Share OTP sent to your number to verify.
Security Alert: Unusual activity on your {department} account. Verify by sharing OTP: {phone}
Your {department} payment of ₹{amount} is pending. Share OTP to complete transaction.
{department} customer care calling. We need your OTP to process refund of ₹{amount}
Your {department} connection details being updated. Please share OTP for verification.
{department} Refund: ₹{amount} approved for your account. Click to claim: {url}
Your {department} excess payment of Rs.{amount} is ready for refund. Process here: {url}
REFUND ALERT: {department} has processed ₹{amount} refund. Verify bank details: {url}
Dear Customer, your {department} refund of ₹{amount} is pending. Complete KYC: {url}
{department} billing error - ₹{amount} overcharged. Claim refund now: {url}
URGENT: Your {department} service will be terminated today. Call immediately: {phone}
{department} ALERT: Connection blocked due to verification failure. Restore now: {url}
Legal notice from {department}: Non-payment of dues. Court case filing in 24 hours unless cleared.
{department}: Your consumer account suspended. Contact helpline {phone} with OTP to reactivate.
FINAL WARNING: {department} services will be permanently disconnected. Act now: {url}
BBMP Recruitment 2024: Apply for {position} post. Salary ₹{amount}/month. Register: {url}
Karnataka Government Jobs: {count} vacancies in {department}. Apply before {date}: {url}
Direct recruitment in {department}. No exam required. Pay ₹{amount} registration fee: {url}
URGENT: Last 10 seats for {department} jobs. Interview call: {phone}
{department} walk-in interview on {date}. Registration fee ₹{amount}. Confirm: {url}

risk_indicators.description: Direct payment link or UPI request

outage_correlation.description: Scams often spike during real outages when citizens are vulnerable
